---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature for the platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature description
What feature should be added?

## Problem it solves
Why is this needed?

## Proposed solution
How should it work?

## Inputs and outputs
What data or modules will it use, and what should it produce?

## Definition of done
- [ ] implemented
- [ ] documented
- [ ] tested or smoke-checked
- [ ] reviewed
